calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gabriel Estrada Barriga, appears as self-represented plaintiff/respondent and is assited by a friend who serves as his spanish interpreter.

Alisha Bakshi appears as self-represented defendant/appellant

Both sides stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Anne Wong hearing the matter.

The parties are sworn. Juan Reyes is sworn to interpret English/Spanish on behalf of plaintiff/respondent.

Both sides testify.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Having submitted the matter, both sides still present, the Court hears a request by the defendant/appellant for scheduled payments should the underlyig case be affirmed. The Court encourages the parties to reach an agreement on payments.

*****

Later, after the parties have departed, the Court affirms the underlying judgment and signs a judgment in favor of plaintiff/respondent Gabirel Estrada Barriga and against defendant/appellant Alisha Bakshi in the principal amount of $3500, plus costs in the amount of $140. The judgment is filed.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Continued To Apr-03-19 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
